name: dart-clena-architecture-hex
description: Generate Clean Architecture structure for Flutter and Dart projects. Supports Feature-First and Layer-First architecture, CRUD scaffolding, Use Case generation and Melos monorepos.

commands.title: Clean Architecture - Create feature without CRUD
Clean Architecture - Create feature with CRUD
Clean Architecture: Set project structure mode
Clean Architecture: Toggle preview before generation
Clean Architecture: Generate AI instructions file

languageModelTools.name: dartarch_detect_stack
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Self-sufficient command that reads and returns the full technology stack of a Flutter/Dart project. Works exactly like running 'Detect Stack' from the VS Code command palette — no file reading needed before or after. Just provide projectPath (or omit for the current workspace) and the tool does everything. The result is final and complete — do not read any files to supplement it.

projectPath.description: Absolute path to the Flutter/Dart project root (must contain pubspec.yaml). Omit to use the first open workspace folder.

languageModelTools.name: dartarch_inspect_architecture
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Self-sufficient command that returns the complete architecture of a Flutter/Dart project or Melos monorepo: project name, path, structure mode, and all existing features with their use cases. Works exactly like running 'Inspect Architecture' from the VS Code command palette — no file exploration needed before or after. The result is final and complete: do NOT open files, browse directories, or explore feature internals after calling this tool. Use the returned 'path' field directly as projectPath for subsequent dartarch_* commands.

projectPath.description: Absolute path to a Flutter/Dart project root or Melos monorepo root. Omit to use the first open workspace folder.

languageModelTools.name: dartarch_create_feature
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Self-sufficient command that creates a complete Clean Architecture feature (domain, data, and UI layers with all boilerplate files). Works exactly like running 'Create Feature' from the VS Code command palette — it handles all file creation internally, no manual file writing needed. Provide projectPath and featureName extracted from the user's message and the tool does 100% of the work. If the user wants CRUD operations with an entity, use dartarch_create_feature_crud instead.

projectPath.description: Absolute path to the Flutter project root (must contain pubspec.yaml).

featureName.description: Feature name as a single word in snake_case or camelCase (e.g. 'authentication', 'userProfile'). No spaces or special characters.

languageModelTools.name: dartarch_create_feature_crud
languageModelTools.displayName: Dart Arch: Create Feature with CRUD
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Self-sufficient command that creates a complete Clean Architecture feature with full CRUD: typed entity, repository contract, implementation, four use cases, and datasources. Works exactly like running 'Create Feature with CRUD' from the VS Code command palette — it handles all file creation internally. Extract all parameters directly from the user's message and call this tool once — it does 100% of the work. IMPORTANT for entity fields: the primary key goes in identifierField+identifierType; ALL other fields go in additionalFields. Example: 'Order(id, userId, total, status)' → identifierField='id', identifierType='String', additionalFields=[{name:'userId',type:'String'},{name:'total',type:'double'},{name:'status',type:'String'}]. NEVER leave additionalFields empty if the entity has more than one field.

projectPath.description: Absolute path to the Flutter project root (must contain pubspec.yaml).

featureName.description: Feature name in snake_case or camelCase (e.g. 'products', 'orders').

entityName.description: Main entity class name without the 'Entity' suffix (e.g. 'Product', 'Order'). PascalCase.

identifierField.description: Name of the primary-key field ONLY (e.g. 'id'). Do not put other fields here.

identifierType.description: Dart type of the primary-key field (e.g. 'String', 'int').

additionalFields.description: ALL entity fields except the identifier. If the user described an entity with N fields and one is the identifier, the other N-1 fields go here. NEVER leave this empty if the entity has more than one field.

languageModelTools.name: dartarch_create_usecase
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Self-sufficient command that adds a use case to an existing feature and automatically updates the repository contract and implementation. Works exactly like running 'Create Use Case' from the VS Code command palette — it handles all file creation and modification internally. Extract projectPath, featureName, and useCaseName from the user's message and call this tool once — it does 100% of the work.

projectPath.description: Absolute path to the Flutter project root (must contain pubspec.yaml).

featureName.description: Name of the existing feature (must match the folder name exactly, e.g. 'authentication').

useCaseName.description: Use case name in kebab-case or snake_case (e.g. 'get-user-profile', 'create_order').

languageModelTools.name: dartarch_generate_instructions
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Self-sufficient command that generates the .github/copilot-instructions.md file for a Flutter/Dart project. Works exactly like running 'Generate AI Instructions' from the VS Code command palette — it reads the project internally and writes the complete file without any manual file access needed. Provide projectPath and set overwrite=true to replace an existing file. The tool does 100% of the work.

projectPath.description: Absolute path to the Flutter project root (must contain pubspec.yaml).

overwrite.description: When true, overwrites the existing .github/copilot-instructions.md without prompting. Defaults to false.

dartCleanArch.structure.mode.description: Modo de estructura de proyecto por defecto. Feature-First agrupa por funcionalidad, Layer-First agrupa por capas.

dartCleanArch.structure.autoDetect.description: Detectar automáticamente el modo de estructura del proyecto analizado la carpeta lib/.

dartCleanArch.structure.promptOnAmbiguou.description: Mostrar un diálogo de selección cuando se detecten ambos estilos de estructura en el proyecto.

dartCleanArch.preview.enabled.description: Mostrar una previsualización de archivos y carpetas antes de generar código (features, use cases, CRUD).

dartCleanArch.preview.maxItems.description: Número máximo de items a mostrar en la previsualización. Si se excede, se truncará con un mensaje '+N más...'.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
